message:
fix: eliminate all compiler warnings (0 warnings for CASS)

Applied cargo fix --tests to remove 38 unnecessary mut qualifiers
across test files and 4 in src/ files. All CASS code now compiles
with zero warnings. Only 3 upstream warnings remain (in asupersync).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -944,6 +944,7 @@ fn replace_file_from_temp(temp_path: &Path, final_path: &Path) -> Result<(), std
             {
                 let backup_path = unique_replace_backup_path(final_path);
                 std::fs::rename(final_path, &backup_path).map_err(|backup_err| {
+                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(temp_path);
                     std::io::Error::other(format!(
                         "failed preparing backup {} before replacing {}: first error: {}; backup error: {}",
                         backup_path.display(),
@@ -960,23 +961,27 @@ fn replace_file_from_temp(temp_path: &Path, final_path: &Path) -> Result<(), std
                     Err(second_err) => {
                         let restore_result = std::fs::rename(&backup_path, final_path);
                         match restore_result {
-                            Ok(()) => Err(std::io::Error::new(
-                                second_err.kind(),
-                                format!(
-                                    "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restored original file",
-                                    final_path.display(),
-                                    temp_path.display(),
-                                    first_err,
-                                    second_err
-                                ),
-                            )),
+                            Ok(()) => {
+                                let _ = std::fs::remove_file(temp_path);
+                                Err(std::io::Error::new(
+                                    second_err.kind(),
+                                    format!(
+                                        "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restored original file",
+                                        final_path.display(),
+                                        temp_path.display(),
+                                        first_err,
+                                        second_err
+                                    ),
+                                ))
+                            }
                             Err(restore_err) => Err(std::io::Error::other(format!(
-                                "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restore error: {}",
+                                "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restore error: {}; temp file retained at {}",
                                 final_path.display(),
                                 temp_path.display(),
                                 first_err,
                                 second_err,
-                                restore_err
+                                restore_err,
+                                temp_path.display()
                             ))),
                         }
                     }

@@ -1699,6 +1699,7 @@ fn replace_file_from_temp(temp_path: &Path, final_path: &Path) -> Result<(), std
             {
                 let backup_path = unique_replace_backup_path(final_path);
                 std::fs::rename(final_path, &backup_path).map_err(|backup_err| {
+                    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(temp_path);
                     std::io::Error::other(format!(
                         "failed preparing backup {} before replacing {}: first error: {}; backup error: {}",
                         backup_path.display(),
@@ -1715,23 +1716,27 @@ fn replace_file_from_temp(temp_path: &Path, final_path: &Path) -> Result<(), std
                     Err(second_err) => {
                         let restore_result = std::fs::rename(&backup_path, final_path);
                         match restore_result {
-                            Ok(()) => Err(std::io::Error::new(
-                                second_err.kind(),
-                                format!(
-                                    "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restored original file",
-                                    final_path.display(),
-                                    temp_path.display(),
-                                    first_err,
-                                    second_err
-                                ),
-                            )),
+                            Ok(()) => {
+                                let _ = std::fs::remove_file(temp_path);
+                                Err(std::io::Error::new(
+                                    second_err.kind(),
+                                    format!(
+                                        "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restored original file",
+                                        final_path.display(),
+                                        temp_path.display(),
+                                        first_err,
+                                        second_err
+                                    ),
+                                ))
+                            }
                             Err(restore_err) => Err(std::io::Error::other(format!(
-                                "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restore error: {}",
+                                "failed replacing {} with {}: first error: {}; second error: {}; restore error: {}; temp file retained at {}",
                                 final_path.display(),
                                 temp_path.display(),
                                 first_err,
                                 second_err,
-                                restore_err
+                                restore_err,
+                                temp_path.display()
                             ))),
                         }
                     }
